function.name: get_file_created_time
function.description: Get the creation time of a file.
function.long_description: Returns the file creation timestamp and formatted datetime details.
example_user_queries: Tell me the file creation time for ./capabilities/stock/get_crypto_price.json.
What is the creation timestamp for ./capabilities/health/calculate_bmi.json?
Give me the created time of ./capabilities/file_metadata/get_file_size.json.
